subject: Re: Je message S76
body:
ok


----- Original Message ----
From: Rahna Jalashgar <rjalashgar@nysgmail.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, April 9, 2008 8:41:50 AM
Subject: FW: Je message S76


 




From: LVJET@aol.com [mailto:LVJET@aol.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, April 09, 2008 11:40 AM
To: Rahna Jalashgar
Subject: Je message S76


for JE message sheet:
could you let JE know that I would like to take Sikorsky to Fort Lauderdale airport  today to show helicopter to Dave Letimeir who is Wayne Heisinga's Director of Aviation and his Helicopter pilots,,,I need a test flight in S76 anyhow since we did a re-torque of rotor head since  paint work has been completed.
Demo flight for Mr. Heisinga is scheduled for next week.  I think this would make a difference.
lv
